tagline: Dashboard relationships (Public Preview): Build complex multi fact data models scoped to an AI/BI dashboard.
what_it_does: Dashboard relationships (Public Preview): Build complex multi fact data models scoped to an AI/BI dashboard. Preview This feature is in Public Preview. Dashboard relationships let you define a semantic model scoped to an AI/BI dashboard.
why_it_matters: For metrics that must be governed and shared across dashboards, Genie Agents, or other tools, use Unity Catalog metric views instead.
key_takeaway: Dashboard relationships (Public Preview): Build complex multi fact data models scoped to an AI/BI dashboard.
